name: Potassium perchlorate
description: Potassium perchlorate is an inorganic salt with the chemical formula KClO4 that acts as a strong oxidizer. KClO4 has the lowest solubility of the alkali metal perchlorates (1.5 g in 100 mL of water at 25 °C) [Wikipedia]. It is used as an antithyroid agent used to treat hyperthyroidism in combination with other standard treatments.
